name: Chicken Macadamia
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, mix together eggs, flour, cornstarch, ginger, onion, pepper, peanut oil, brandy, and 2 tablespoons soy sauce.
2. Marinate the chicken pieces in the batter for 20 minutes.
3. In a saucepan, combine brown sugar, 3 tablespoons soy sauce, cornstarch, vinegar, and water. Simmer over low heat for 15 minutes.
4. Deep fry the chicken pieces in peanut oil at 350°F (175°C) for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
5. Serve the chicken over rice and spoon the sauce over the top. Top with chopped macadamia nuts.
